title: Loan Officer (Finance / Credit) | 5.5 Day  | Lavender | Basic up to $3,000 + Commission
description:
📍 Location: Jalan Besar, Singapore
💼 Employment Type: Full-Time
🕒 Working Schedule: 5.5-Day Work Week
💰 Monthly Salary: SGD 2,200 – 3,000 + Commission

About the Company

Singdasing Gold Trading Pte. Ltd. is a customer-focused financial services company providing secured loan solutions. We are expanding our Finance / Credit team and are looking for a Loan Officer who is service-oriented and detail-driven.

Key Responsibilities

  • Assess and process loan applications, including eligibility checks, income verification, and basic credit evaluation

  • Explain loan products, repayment structures, and procedures clearly to customers

  • Respond to customer enquiries via phone, messaging platforms, and email

  • Recommend suitable loan or repayment solutions based on customer needs

  • Ensure proper documentation, accurate data entry, and timely submission

  • Follow up on outstanding documents, loan status, and repayment matters

  • Maintain accurate customer records and communication logs

  • Promote loan products, including renewals and cross-selling opportunities

  • Ensure compliance with internal policies, regulatory requirements, and data protection standards

  • Handle customer concerns professionally and escalate complex cases when required

  • Perform other administrative or operational duties as assigned

Requirements

  • Minimum 1–2 years of relevant experience in loans, credit assessment, financial services, or customer service

  • Ability to analyse basic financial information and assess customer risk profiles

  • Good communication and interpersonal skills

  • Customer-focused and able to manage challenging situations professionally

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office; experience with CRM or loan systems is an advantage

  • Ability to communicate in English for work-related communication

  • Ability to communicate in Mandarin is preferred, as the role involves handling enquiries from Mandarin-speaking customers

Working Hours

  • Monday to Friday:

    • Shift A: 9:30 AM – 6:00 PM

    • Shift B: 11:00 AM – 7:30 PM

  • Saturday:

    • Shift A: 9:30 AM – 1:00 PM

    • Shift B: 11:00 AM – 3:30 PM

  • Sunday: Rest Day

Salary & Benefits

  • Basic Salary: SGD 2,200 – 3,000 (commensurate with experience)

  • Commission Scheme: Available after confirmation

  • Estimated Monthly Gross: SGD 2,800 – 3,800+

  • Variable Bonus: Performance-based

  • Annual Leave: 7 days (up to 10 days based on tenure)

  • Supportive team environment with structured guidance

    EA License No: 23C1703

    EA Personnel No: R1762582

    EA Personnel Name: Wong Choo Sian, Jabez
